Class AbstractBox

java.lang.Object
com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.boxes.AbstractBox
All Implemented Interfaces:
Box, Renderable
Direct Known Subclasses:
ClassicBox, DefaultBox
public abstract class AbstractBox extends Object implements Box, Renderable
